Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I was planning on seeing this with a friend from my club... I thought it might help motivate us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 6 25 25}{f 4 21 2 11}You might think it's kinda cheesy, though... Now I'm not so sure about this...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_900_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Come on, show me some guts! Push your limits! You swore you'd take us to nationals![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_901_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}And then the big leagues, the World Series, and then the Olympics! That was our promise![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_902_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I'll never forget! I'm gonna make it! I won't stop running till I reach the sunset![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned that with enough willpower,[n]you can overcome anything...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}That was awesome! We were in there for a while, but it went by so fast![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I guess there really are times in life where you gotta push yourself through with sheer willpower.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}But I'm still young... I haven't really done anything that crazy just yet.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Oh wow, it's getting late. How many movies did we watch?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}We saw the baseball one, the judo one, the boot camp one... Oh right, even shot put![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}The shot put stuff kinda lost me, but the scenes after that with the main guy running were so good.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I cried my eyes out when he did the hundred handstands into the sunset![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Anyway, I'm getting hungry. Why don't we grab a bite somewhere before heading back?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to go back to[n]the dorm with Yukari.[n]{f 1 1}
